Petition For Order Authorizing Conveyance Of Title To Property By Executor To Persons'S Entitled Thereto
Off Calendar Jul-26-2011 Continued To Sep-12-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-05-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Peter Dmytryk for Gladys Thatcher.

The Court stated that there were two issues: the disclaimer and the reformation regarding Gladys. Mr. Dmytryk stated that this was a disclaimer of "A & B", "A" turned out to be a Trust that had no assets, that that was the first thing they had to disclaim or it would have been a problem, that this is simply an English grammar issue, that nowhere does it say that they disclaimed the entire amount; the intent was to disclaim 1.4 million dollars, and that they did not disclaim the residue of the Estate. In addition, Mr. Dmytryk addressed the reformation stating that Social Security's definition is very different from theirs; things like dental, etc., aren't included and that it is clear that the decedent wanted this support for his daughter. The Court inquired as to the naming of Gladys as Trustee. Mr. Dmytryk stated that Gladys wants to serve and that everyone in the family is in support of her serving. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy McConico.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
